title: [HandshakeToFIRRTL] Elaborate module naming to also consider operand types
body:
Currently, submodule names are based on the # of input/outputs of an operation + the return type of the operation:
https://github.com/llvm/circt/blob/312a65e9c51f569149495dbfabf07f608262ab0a/lib/Conversion/HandshakeToFIRRTL/HandshakeToFIRRTL.cpp#L137

With the introduction of unary operators https://github.com/llvm/circt/pull/1865 we need submodule names to also be dependent on operand types.
Currently, 
```
... = index cast ... i8 to index
... = index cast ... i10 to index
```
Will both generate a `std_index_cast_1ins_1outs_ui64` named component. In that case, the 2nd index cast will map to the component generated by the 1st, and there will be a width mismatch.
